name: Vegan Fish Sauce

ingredients.item: sheet (4 by 8 inches/10 by 20 cm) dried kelp (kombu seaweed)

method: In a medium saucepan, combine dried shiitake mushrooms, dried kelp, and water, and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Boil for 5 minutes, and then add pineapple, salt, rock sugar, cinnamon, star anise, and soy sauce.
Simmer on low heat until the sauce is reduced by half, about 30 minutes.
Strain to remove all solids, let cool, and then transfer to an airtight glass jar or bottle.
Store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
